name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers fast payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50K with same-day funding at a Detroit-area storefront and online.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical location at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, alongside online lending services. The company specializes in emergency short-term loans designed for consumers who need quick access to cash, including payday loans ($1,000 or less), cash advance loans, same-day loans, and bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000. According to their website, they welcome all credit types and offer unsecured loans with minimal paperwork.

Their service offerings include payday loans, cash advances, loans without credit checks, same-day loans, quick loans, bad credit loans, debt consolidation, cash loans, and personal loans for bad credit. The company advertises a five-step process: fill out an online inquiry form, get connected to a third-party lender, receive and review the offer, sign the contract, and receive cash. Customer reviews mention processing times of under 45 minutes in-person and same-day funding for online applications.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through in-person service quality, with customer reviews praising staff member Doris for transparent communication, patience, and clear explanation of repayment terms. The company advertises no hidden fees, acceptance of bad credit, no collateral requirements, and flexibility in loan use. Their physical location operates extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays, 10am–7pm weekends), and they maintain a stated 4.4-star customer review rating based on the testimonials provided.

As an emergency-cash lender, US Cash Advance operates in a high-cost lending category. While customers praise transparency and quick funding, the website does not disclose APR rates, fees, repayment terms, or state-specific regulatory compliance details. Consumers should note that payday loans and cash advances typically carry substantially higher interest rates than traditional personal loans, and the website mentions third-party lender connections without clarity on whether US Cash Advance is the direct lender or a lead generator.
address: 9 N Summerlin Ave a1, Orlando, FL 32801

company_info.headquarters: 9 N Summerlin Ave a1, Orlando, FL 32801

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
In-person service at Detroit location with extended operating hours (8am–9pm weekdays)
Accepts all credit types, including bad credit, with no credit check loans available
No collateral required; unsecured loans available up to $50,000
Staff praised for transparency and clear explanation of repayment terms with no hidden fees reported
Fast approval process documented at under 45 minutes in-person
Flexible loan use—customers can use funds for any purpose
cons: APR rates and fee structures not disclosed on website; typical payday loan rates are 400%+ APR
Uses third-party lender connections, creating uncertainty about direct lending relationship and regulatory accountability
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area at physical location
No online pre-approval option mentioned; some customer reviews suggest this would speed up process
Regulatory compliance details (state licensing, disclosures, repayment terms) not provided on website
best_for: Consumers with bad credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours
In-person borrowers in Detroit who prefer face-to-face loan discussion and verification
Short-term cash needs ($100–$1,000) for unexpected expenses like medical bills or urgent repairs
Borrowers without collateral who cannot access traditional bank loans
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for consumers in the Detroit area who need emergency cash within 24 hours and have bad credit or limited traditional lending options. The main caveat is that payday and cash advance loans typically carry very high APR rates (400%+ annually); borrowers should carefully review all fees and repayment terms before committing, and the website's lack of rate disclosure is a red flag that requires clarification before applying.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit storefront
